title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
BTC.D one-month low ~54% (from 58.12%, -7%): capital rotating into altcoins — "Others" bucket up from 19.4% to 24.7%.
FOMC June minutes due 2pm ET today: 9/18 officials project ≥1 hike; Warsh withheld his dot — Sep hike odds ~50-55%.
BTC $63,673 (+0.7% 24h). ETH $1,754 (-0.7% 24h). DXY ~101, steady. Gold ~$4,140, easing from 2-week highs.
